title: Configure Cloudflare production environment variables
description: Cloudflare Pages production environment variables are configured/synced by the user. Confirmed Wrangler can access the senshac Pages project and list deployments with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID active. Active env set includes Tina, Turnstile, Resend, contact email, branch, and NODE_OPTIONS values from private env.

title: Test contact form in production
description: Production contact form tested on preview.senshac.com. Contact page returns 200 and renders hx-post /es/api/contact plus Turnstile widget. Same-origin POST with valid required fields returned 200 Spanish success HTML. Required-field validation returns 400. Cross-site POST returns 403. Cloudflare Pages secret list confirms RESEND_API_KEY and TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY are present as encrypted production secrets. Note: automated success submission used qa@example.com and likely sent one production email.

title: Run final QA across all pages
description: Final production QA across pages using browser-cli/manual browser automation plus curl checks. Scope: multilingual homepage, about, services, projects index/detail, contact, legal/privacy, admin redirect, robots/sitemap/llms, responsive/mobile, console errors, and core SEO/static assets.
closeReason: Production QA passed after deploying Tina admin Rocket Loader opt-out and Hyperscript side-effect import fix. Route matrix returned 200s, contact negative tests returned 400/403, admin fallback no longer appears, and browser-cli smoke showed no public-page browserInit runtime error.

title: Add founder photo placeholder
description: Pending content task from migrated memory: add or replace the founder photo placeholder.

title: Evaluate remaining WordPress migration assets
description: Content migration memory still lists fonts/images/custom cursor and LocalBusiness JSON-LD follow-ups. Review what is stale versus still needed before closing the migration archive.

title: Add TinaCMS visual editing for Astro pages
description: Implement TinaCMS visual/contextual editing for preview.senshac.com using the Astro-specific @tinacms/astro flow. Start with one narrow page, then extend the pattern to core pages and project pages. Scope includes Tina integration, requestWithMetadata data loading, TinaIsland renderers, tinaField markers, tina-island endpoint, and preview verification.

title: Resolve Resend receiving MX conflict
description: Resend receiving DNS fixed on inbound.senshac.com. User confirmed Ireland/eu-west-1. After Resend/Cloudflare automatic changes briefly changed inbound MX to feedback-smtp.eu-west-1.amazonses.com, corrected it back to inbound-smtp.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com priority 10 TTL 3600. Root senshac.com Google Workspace MX and preview.senshac.com Pages CNAME left unchanged.
closeReason: Resend receiving MX added on inbound.senshac.com using confirmed Ireland/eu-west-1 target; root Google Workspace MX left unchanged.

title: Organize TinaCMS admin collections
description: Reduce the TinaCMS admin sidebar from duplicated per-locale collections into a smaller content-type-oriented collection model: Site, Pages, Portfolio, Legal, and System.

title: Define target TinaCMS sidebar collection map
description: Document the desired Tina admin collection structure and exact collection names/labels before editing tina/config.ts. Include Site Configuration, Home, About, Services, Contact, Projects, Legal Pages, and Translations. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Consolidate Tina page collections by content type
description: Replace per-locale Home/About/Services/Contact Tina collections with one collection per page type using match.include patterns over {es,ca,en}. Preserve allowedActions and visual editing routers. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Consolidate Tina project collections across locales
description: Replace projects_es/projects_ca/projects_en with one Projects collection spanning src/content/projects/{es,ca,en}. Keep project creation behavior, filename handling, and locale-aware visual editing router. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Consolidate Tina legal collections across locales
description: Replace legal_es/legal_ca/legal_en with one Legal Pages collection spanning src/content/legal/{es,ca,en}. Preserve MDX format and locale-aware router. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Consolidate Tina translation collections
description: Replace translations_es/translations_ca/translations_en with one Translations collection, while keeping create/delete disabled and making locale files easy to identify in the admin. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Regenerate Tina types after collection consolidation
description: Run the Tina build/generation step after collection names change, review generated GraphQL names, and keep generated files aligned. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Update Tina data loaders for consolidated collections
description: Replace per-locale getHomeEs/getHomeCa/etc. loader duplication with loaders matching the consolidated Tina collections and locale-aware relative paths. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Update Tina island registry after collection consolidation
description: Replace per-locale island registry entries with consolidated collection island entries where possible, preserving TinaIsland fetch/propsFromData behavior. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Update Astro routes for consolidated Tina collections
description: Update home, about, services, and project detail routes to call the consolidated loaders/islands while preserving all locale visual editing routes. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Verify Tina admin sidebar organization
description: Use browser-cli against /admin to confirm the Tina sidebar shows the reduced collection list and that collection links open visual editing routes where expected. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Verify consolidated Tina rollout on preview
description: Run astro check, build, deploy to Cloudflare Pages, Betterleaks, and smoke-test all localized home/about/services/project routes for Tina bridge and field markers. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Add fx Flox command suite
description: Create an extensible fx helper for Flox-backed project workflows while keeping dx as the primitive direnv exec wrapper. Start with subcommands for run/check/build/deploy/ready/smoke and document the command surface in README/AGENTS.

title: Fix TinaCloud schema mismatch after consolidated collections
description: Tina admin on preview.senshac.com reports GraphQL Schema Mismatch and GetCollection failed: Expected to find collection named home. Local generated schema has home/about/services/projects collections, so TinaCloud indexed schema for main is stale or failed to update after consolidated collection rollout.
closeReason: Updated tina/tina-lock.json to the consolidated Tina collection schema so TinaCloud can index collection home.

title: Fix Tina visual editing on singleton pages
description: Fix Tina visual editing on singleton pages. Current reproducible symptom after clean CMS restart: rendering /es/ logs GraphQL Source error "Body must be a string. Received: undefined" from the Tina island/query path while the page remains 200. Verify home, studio, methods, contact, and legal singleton query identity, wrapper metadata, click-to-edit, live updates, and saves.

title: Implement PDF-driven Home, Method, and Studio redesign
Update editorial slugs and restore homepage hero
Implement R2 media pipeline and close reference UI gaps
Enable R2 and deploy Senshac media infrastructure
description: Cloudflare account 41d4ea19fb0990f630257332c927aedb returns code 10042 until R2 is enabled. After enablement: run infra/r2/provision.sh, bind MEDIA_RAW to Pages, configure media.senshac.com and env secrets, deploy workers/media-dispatch, and add GitHub Actions secrets.

title: Match local home composition and typography to live WordPress reference
Provision and verify Senshac Cloudflare R2 media storage
Fix CMS runtime regressions after R2 media migration
description: Reproduce and fix local CMS page failures introduced by R2 migration: editorial Showcase receives null items from Tina and crashes on items.length; branding media IDs are requested as relative /es/brand/... URLs. Verify /es/, admin, Tina API, and R2 asset requests.

title: Clarify updated WEB.pdf redesign requirements with owner
description: Owner decisions recorded: WEB.pdf page 1 Home collapsed, page 2 Home expanded, page 3 Methods collapsed, page 4 Methods expanded, page 5 Works. Home/Methods use independent inline + and - controls with ease-in-out animation, start collapsed, and persist no state. Site target is cookie-free and GDPR/ePrivacy compliant. Novedades automatically synchronizes selected posts from Senshac own Instagram Professional account through a scheduled server-side Meta API sync. Selection marker is the exact hashtag token #novedades, matched case-insensitively; substring variants such as #novedades2026 do not match. Matching posts are stored as a first-party R2/content snapshot and rendered without Meta embeds/SDK/browser requests. Remaining decisions: sync cadence; ordering/count; caption/localization behavior; video/carousel presentation; removal behavior; meaning of Encuéntranos en sections.

title: Implement tagged Novedades content model
description: Define the first-party Novedades record produced by Instagram sync: Instagram media ID/permalink, caption, parsed marker tags, media type, R2 image/video IDs where permitted, publication timestamp, sync timestamp, visible state, deterministic ordering, locale/fallback behavior, and tombstone/removal policy. Eligibility requires the exact case-insensitive hashtag token #novedades. Tina provides emergency visibility/order overrides but routine updates require no extra editorial step.

title: Build Novedades carousel from filtered posts
description: Render one accessible responsive Novedades carousel from synchronized first-party records filtered by the approved marker hashtag. Include keyboard/touch controls, first-party R2 media, external Instagram permalink, loading/empty/last-known-good states, video/carousel handling, and no Meta embed, SDK, cookies, or browser request.

title: Deliver revised Senshac website redesign
description: Coordinate implementation of the revised WEB.pdf reference across homepage, methods, works, Novedades, media, Tina editing, responsive QA, automation, and production release.

title: Audit revised WEB.pdf against WordPress and local site
description: Create a page-by-page discrepancy inventory for updated WEB.pdf, senshac.com, and localhost at agreed desktop/mobile viewports. Record layout, typography, copy, media, navigation, and interaction gaps; PDF remains reference only.

title: Implement revised homepage structure and copy
description: Implement revised homepage value proposition, objectives, audience rows, calls to action, Novedades placement, and project CTA. Home matches WEB.pdf page 1 when all disclosures are collapsed and page 2 when expanded. Each expandable section has its own accessible + and - control, matching the current site iteration, with independent state and an ease-in-out animation. All sections start collapsed and no state is persisted.

title: Match homepage hero typography and offset slogan
description: Match the homepage first viewport to approved references: window proportions, font sizes, line lengths, and the three-line even/odd/even slogan offset on desktop and mobile.

title: Implement detailed methods page content
description: Implement the four method phases, detailed phase deliverables, CTA sections, three service tiers, and contact/footer transition. Methods matches WEB.pdf page 3 when all disclosures are collapsed and page 4 when expanded. Each expandable phase/section has its own accessible + and - control, matching the current site iteration, with independent state and an ease-in-out animation. All sections start collapsed and no state is persisted.

title: Implement revised works index and project cards
description: Implement the revised works index for La Trobada, Doley, Rude, Cinquanta-Nou, and Kylie 360 with category, summary, R2 media placeholder/ID, and project destination.

title: Migrate studio works methods routes and redirects
description: Make /studio, /works, and /methods the canonical multilingual route slugs, update navigation/content links/canonicals, and add redirects from legacy slugs without breaking project detail URLs.

title: Assign R2 redesign media to approved content slots
description: Map uploaded images and HLS videos under redesign IDs to approved homepage, methods, works, and Novedades slots. Keep placeholders where owner approval or final assets are missing.

title: Run responsive typography and layout QA
description: Validate desktop and mobile layouts against approved references, including viewport proportions, type scale, line breaks, carousel controls, no overlap, and media framing.

title: Run final local and production smoke suite
description: Run Astro check/build, multilingual route checks, CMS/admin editing checks, R2 image/font/HLS checks, redirects, SEO endpoints, accessibility smoke, and contact flow before production release.

title: Deploy revised site and verify production
description: Deploy the approved build to Cloudflare Pages, verify production pages/assets/admin/redirects, and capture deployment ID and rollback point.

title: Configure R2 event notification and dispatch Worker
description: Configure senshac-media-raw PutObject event notification, deploy the media-dispatch Worker, store GitHub token as Worker secret, and verify repository_dispatch payload delivery.

title: Implement GitHub media processing workflow
description: Implement extension routing for image/video/font inputs, download raw R2 objects, run sharp/ffmpeg processors, upload immutable production outputs, and report failures without exposing credentials.

title: Verify media workflow with rootless Podman act
description: Run the media GitHub Actions workflow locally with rootless Podman act using .secrets.act, representative image/video events, and assertions for processed output and upload behavior.

title: Configure remaining Cloudflare production environment variables
description: Configure production Resend, contact email, Turnstile, analytics, Tina, and media environment variables/bindings; document names without committing secret values.

title: Verify production contact form delivery
description: Submit the production contact form with valid and invalid cases, verify Turnstile and email delivery, and confirm no sensitive values appear in logs or responses.

title: Resolve founder portrait content slot
description: Confirm whether the uploaded Ester portrait is approved for the studio/founder section; assign the R2 media ID or retain an explicit placeholder pending owner approval.

title: Audit cookie-free GDPR and ePrivacy compliance
description: Audit the site for cookies, localStorage/sessionStorage, tracking pixels, analytics, Instagram/YouTube embeds, third-party requests, fonts/media, form data processing, logs, retention, privacy/legal copy, and consent requirements. Target no non-essential client storage or tracking; document lawful basis and required disclosures. Legal review remains owner/counsel responsibility.

title: Configure Meta app and Senshac Instagram authorization
description: Senshac Instagram is confirmed as a Professional account. Create/configure the Meta app, select Business or Creator-specific login path as applicable, authorize only required scopes for reading Senshac own media, store credentials as Cloudflare secrets, document token renewal/revocation, and verify account media access. No Meta SDK or client-side embed.

title: Build scheduled tagged Instagram post sync
description: Implement a scheduled server-side sync for Senshac own Instagram media. Fetch recent account media and captions; select posts containing the exact case-insensitive hashtag token #novedades, excluding longer substring tags such as #novedades2026; normalize image/video/carousel metadata; upsert deterministic Novedades records and approved R2 snapshots where platform terms permit; remove browser dependency on Meta; retain last successful feed on API failure.

title: Monitor Instagram sync and token health
description: Add sync observability for last success, imported/skipped/error counts, token-expiry and authorization failures, rate-limit handling, alert/runbook, and safe manual resync. Site must keep serving the last valid Novedades snapshot when sync fails.
